pickup.name: Tidal Shell
pickup.effect: Provides a hydro-shield that mitigates pressure damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct forces the ancient water-conduit to rotate, unlocking the path to the trench floor.

pickup.name: Obsidian Shard
pickup.effect: Enhances tectonic attacks with extra blunt force

encounters.trigger: Soothed by the shell, the eel retreats, causing the trench floor to shift and reveal a staircase to the sanctum.

pickup.name: Essence of the Tide
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden pressure plates and magical seals

encounters.trigger: Shattering the guardian triggers the final hydraulic seal to the Throne of the Abyssal King.

boss.name: The Abyssal King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence of the Tide to disrupt the King's connection to the abyss, rendering him vulnerable to physical assault.

level.objective: Retrieve the Abyssal Heart from the depths of the ruins.
level.reward: Mastery over the tectonic tides and the ability to breathe underwater indefinitely.

pickup.name: Sea-Snail Shell
pickup.effect: Grants shell armor to companion

encounters.trigger: Clearing the path to the Inner Trench

pickup.name: Ancient Coral Fragment
pickup.effect: Provides health regeneration

encounters.trigger: Activating the ancient pressure switch

pickup.name: Siren's Scale
pickup.effect: Calms aggressive creatures

encounters.trigger: Summoning the guardian boss

boss.name: Bioluminescent Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Calm the beast to restore peace to the sanctuary

level.objective: Restore harmony to the Sunken Coral Sanctuary by pacifying the guardian

pickup.name: Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Restores necrotic energy

encounters.trigger: Reanimating the thrall reveals the hidden entrance to the central abyss.

pickup.name: Cursed Anchor
pickup.effect: Heavy impact bonus damage

encounters.trigger: The anchor's shadow points toward the seal of the sunken gate.

pickup.name: Abyssal Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Leviathan's chamber

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Abyssal Key into the stone pedestal awakens the boss.

boss.name: Leviathan Husk
boss.victory_condition: Bind the soul of the Leviathan to the necrotic altar.

level.objective: Exorcise the sunken ruins and claim the depths for the afterlife.

pickup.name: Thermal Regulator
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to freezing hazards

encounters.trigger: Breaching the cooling pipe reveals the next sector

pickup.name: Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Disrupts mechanical sensory input

encounters.trigger: Activating the motion sensor alerts the next sentinel

pickup.name: Ancient Keystone
pickup.effect: Stabilizes temporal anomalies

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the vault seal triggers the boss awakening

boss.name: Leviathan Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Deplete boss health while the keystone is slotted into the control console

pickup.name: Thermal Flare
pickup.effect: Temporarily stuns mechanical enemies and provides visibility

encounters.trigger: Opening the ventilation hatch leads to the lab corridor

pickup.name: Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Disorients biological entities with high-frequency sound

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone grants access to the main pressure seal

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Abyssal Warden's shield generator

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Ancient Relic Key activates the final boss door

boss.name: The Abyssal Warden

level.objective: Retrieve the Deep-Core Drive from the Abyssal Warden

pickup.name: Steam Vent Module
pickup.effect: Increases heat dispersion area

encounters.trigger: Crab death releases the pressure lock on the cave entrance

pickup.name: Pressure-Stabilized Core
pickup.effect: Negates depth pressure damage

encounters.trigger: Eel swarm defeat triggers a seismic collapse opening the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Ancient Thermal Catalyst
pickup.effect: Supercharges fire-based attacks

encounters.trigger: Anglerfish death shatters the barrier to the Kraken Lair

boss.name: Abyssal Kraken
boss.victory_condition: Overload the creature's central heart using the Catalyst

level.objective: Survive the trench and escape before the volcanic eruption destroys the underwater ruins

pickup.name: Thermal Capacitor
pickup.effect: Allows damage to cold-blooded organic matter

encounters.trigger: Drone death drops a keycard for the Reactor Shaft

pickup.name: Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Disrupts the sonar sense of creatures

encounters.trigger: Emitter tone lures the Void Stalker out of the shadows

pickup.name: Bio-luminescent Catalyst
pickup.effect: Reveals structural weaknesses and blinds bosses

encounters.trigger: Catalyst illuminates the path to the Leviathan Prime boss chamber

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Overload the primary pressure valve while the boss is blinded

level.objective: Stabilize the facility core before the total implosion

pickup.name: Sparkle Dust
pickup.effect: Increases vision clarity

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab clears the path to the Crystal Cave

pickup.name: Refraction Lens
pickup.effect: Focuses light beams into solid energy

encounters.trigger: The ghost dissipates, unveiling the entrance to the Abyssal Palace

encounters.location: Outer gates of the Abyssal Palace

pickup.name: Tidal Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the throne room

encounters.trigger: Stealing the key triggers the final boss encounter

boss.name: King Octopus of Illusions
boss.victory_condition: Use the Tidal Key to shatter his projection barrier

level.objective: Reach the heart of the coral reef and reclaim the stolen light
level.reward: The Eternal Tide Amulet of Truth

pickup.name: Soothing Herb
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed and precision against feral targets

encounters.trigger: Defeating the viper clears the thicket blocking the inner courtyard.

pickup.name: Ancient Totem
pickup.effect: Grants command over territorial spirits

encounters.trigger: Subduing the ape reveals the hidden mechanism to lower the bridge.

pickup.name: Celestial Tear
pickup.effect: Stuns the boss for a limited time

encounters.trigger: Exorcising the shadow opens the stone passage to the main altar room.

boss.name: Primordial Gorilla King
boss.victory_condition: Paralyze the boss with the Celestial Tear and defeat it while incapacitated.

level.objective: Restore balance to the corrupted temple by defeating the Primordial Gorilla King.
level.reward: Crown of the Beastmaster, granting enhanced summons and animal affinity.

level.setting: Ancient Overgrown Ruins in the Heart of the Whisper-Leaf Jungle

pickup.name: Ancient Fire-Oil
pickup.effect: Ignites objects and enemies for continuous damage over time

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals the ancient trail leading to the Moss-Back Grove

encounters.hazard: Swamp gas pockets that reduce stamina

pickup.name: Enchanted Sight Lens
pickup.effect: Allows the wearer to see invisible entities

encounters.trigger: Clearing the grove reveals the stone pedestal leading to the Forbidden Tomb entrance

pickup.name: Golden Key Fragment
pickup.effect: Unlocks the seals on ancient monolithic entities

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the key fragment unlocks the Inner Sanctum where the Stone Titan resides

boss.name: Stone Titan
boss.victory_condition: Use the Golden Key Fragment to shatter the Titan's protective armor before striking the core

level.objective: Retrieve the Emerald Idol of Ancients hidden within the Forbidden Tomb.
level.reward: The Emerald Idol of Ancients and the title of Forest Warden.

level.setting: Ancient ruins reclaimed by toxic flora and encroaching vines

pickup.name: Corrosive Potion
pickup.effect: Dissolves hardened organic armor

encounters.trigger: Blood sacrifice on the altar unlocks the gate to the canopy bridge

pickup.name: Glowing Pollen Sample
pickup.effect: Stuns insectoid hive-mind creatures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the predator causes the bridge to collapse into the hive nest

pickup.name: Ancient Stone Key
pickup.effect: Opens the central seal of the boss chamber

encounters.trigger: The death of the guard triggers the shifting of the stone walls revealing the inner sanctum

boss.name: The Verdant Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Stone Key to override the boss's healing fountain and shatter its crystal core

level.objective: Infiltrate the sacred ruin, purge the corruption, and survive the jungle's wrath

level.setting: An ancient, glowing forest sanctuary where nature and magic converge in a serene atmosphere.

pickup.name: Dewdrop Vial
pickup.effect: Infuses the staff with flowing water essence.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spirit clears the mist and reveals the overgrown path leading to the canopy.

encounters.hazard: Thick, tangled vines that impede movement

pickup.name: Golden Spore
pickup.effect: Amplifies light-based damage and clarity.

encounters.trigger: The fallen cub releases a harmonic chime that awakens the stone carvings blocking the path to the Sunlit Altar.

pickup.name: Heart Root Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the ancient mechanisms of the Heart Tree.

encounters.trigger: Stepping onto the central pedestal after the lynx is pacified causes the earth to shift, forming a bridge to the boss lair.

boss.name: Corrupted Jungle Keeper
boss.victory_condition: Purify the Keeper by channeling the power of the Heart Root Key at the central altar to restore its natural state.

level.objective: Restore balance to the Heart Tree by purifying the corrupted Jungle Keeper.
level.reward: Eternal Guardian's Blessing and restoration of the jungle sanctuary.

pickup.name: Soul-Infused Dew
pickup.effect: Increases shadow damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stag reveals a shimmering trail through the vines leading deeper

pickup.name: Ancient Ritual Dagger
pickup.effect: Pierces through ethereal armor

encounters.trigger: The panther's collapse causes the nearby blood-altar to glow, opening the passage

pickup.name: Sun-Cursed Idol
pickup.effect: Weakens the heart of the forest

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct awakens the slumbering Matriarch within the central monolith

boss.name: Matriarch of Rot
boss.victory_condition: Banish the Matriarch to the void using the power of the idol

level.objective: Purge the corruption from the ancient canopy

pickup.name: Fire Essence Catalyst

encounters.trigger: Defeating the slime causes a chemical reaction that burns away the thorny barrier leading to the canopy bridge

pickup.name: Cooling Nectar
pickup.effect: Reduces incoming damage by 50 percent

encounters.trigger: Clearing the bridge reveals a hidden lift mechanism that leads up to the Temple of Petals

pickup.name: Stabilizing Resin
pickup.effect: Hardens alchemical concoctions for high impact

encounters.trigger: The bat's fall triggers the stone doors to the temple sanctum to slide open for the boss fight

boss.name: Grand Potion Golem
boss.victory_condition: Drench the Golem in Stabilizing Resin to return it to a harmless, static state

level.objective: Retrieve the Golden Pollen to restore the village's alchemical garden

pickup.name: Ancient Sundial

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Vine Creeper reveals a hidden path to the Ruined Stone Temple.

pickup.name: Chronos Shard

encounters.trigger: Banishing the phantom with the Sundial unseals the gate to the Altar of the Lost.

pickup.name: Heart of Time

encounters.trigger: Shattering the statue breaks the protective seal, waking the boss.

boss.name: The Chrono-Wraith

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of Time and cleanse the jungle of the Chrono-Wraith's rot.

level.setting: Ruined Ziggurat of the Lost King

pickup.name: Aromatic Resin

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker clears the vines blocking the entrance to the inner courtyard.

pickup.name: Enchanted Whetstone

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Sentinel releases the mystical seal locking the staircase to the temple peak.

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Shard

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wraith causes the structural pillars to crumble, creating a bridge to the boss throne.

boss.name: The Verdant Blight

level.objective: Cleanse the corrupt temple to stop the jungle's unnatural decay.
